services.name: Deep Cleaning
services.description: Top-to-bottom deep clean: kitchen degrease, bathroom descale, dust extraction, floor scrub, balcony, interior windows.

services.name: General Cleaning
services.description: Standard maintenance clean — dusting, mopping, bathrooms, kitchen wipe-down. Best for already-clean homes.

services.name: Hourly Maid
services.description: Trained maid for housekeeping. Hourly basis, minimum 2 hours.

services.name: Move-In / Move-Out
services.description: Vacant property handover clean. Inside cabinets, oven, fridge included.

services.name: Office Cleaning
services.description: Daily, weekly, or one-off office cleaning. Workstations, pantry, restrooms, reception.

services.name: Post-Construction
services.description: Heavy-debris cleanup after fit-out. Cement haze removal, paint splatter, HEPA dust extraction.

services.name: Sofa & Carpet Shampoo
services.description: Deep extraction shampoo for sofas, carpets, mattresses.

services.name: AC Duct & Coil Cleaning
services.description: Split AC and central duct cleaning. Coil wash, drain pan flush, filter clean.

services.name: Disinfection & Sanitization
services.description: MOH-approved disinfection. ULV fogging + electrostatic spray. Certificate provided.

services.name: Window Cleaning
services.description: Interior + accessible exterior windows. Glass, frames, sills.

services.name: Pest Control
services.description: General pest treatment for cockroaches, ants, bedbugs, rodents. Municipality-approved chemicals.

services.name: Laundry & Ironing
services.description: Pickup, wash, iron, deliver. Per-piece or per-kg.

services.name: Babysitting / Nanny
services.description: Trained, background-checked nannies. Hourly or by-the-day.

services.name: Gardening & Landscaping
services.description: Lawn mowing, hedge trimming, plant care, irrigation check.

services.name: Handyman
services.description: Plumbing, electrical, carpentry, painting touch-ups. Hourly + parts.

services.name: Kitchen Deep Clean
services.description: Inside oven, hood, fridge, freezer. Cabinet degrease, tile descaling.

services.name: Villa Deep Clean
services.description: Full-villa deep clean including outdoor. 4-person crew. By size.
